TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_François_Hollande, title = François_Hollande, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/François_Hollande} }

S.FORM: François Hollande ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, François Hollande, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw France ta' misuw hya' ga François Hollande, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His presidential term ended on 14 May 2017.

François Hollande ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, François Hollande, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw France ta' misuw hya' ga François Hollande, aring ryax tay 15 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. His presidential term ended on 14 May 2017.
S.PHON: *ran*ois~ɕ ħollan*e rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *ran*ois~ɕ ħollan*e, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *ranʦ~ʨe taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *ran*ois~ɕ ħollan*e, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ħis~ɕ pres~ɕi*ential term en*e* on ** maj ****.
